creator: dharrigan@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

$ uname -a
FreeBSD unifi 11.0-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p1 #0 r306420: Thu Sep 29 01:43:23 UTC 2016     root@releng2.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd

Upgrading to 5.2.9 and receiving this error:

$ make install             
===>  Installing for unifi5-5.2.9
===>   unifi5-5.2.9 depends on package: mongodb>0 - found
===>   unifi5-5.2.9 depends on package: snappyjava>0 - found
===>   unifi5-5.2.9 depends on file: /usr/local/openjdk8/bin/java - found
===>  Checking if unifi5 already installed
===>   Registering installation for unifi5-5.2.9
pkg-static: lstat(/var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/net-mgmt/unifi5/work/stage/usr/local/share/java/unifi/conf/): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/net-mgmt/unifi5/work/stage/usr/local/share/java/unifi/data/): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/net-mgmt/unifi5/work/stage/usr/local/share/java/unifi/logs/): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/net-mgmt/unifi5/work/stage/usr/local/share/java/unifi/run/): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/net-mgmt/unifi5/work/stage/usr/local/share/java/unifi/work/): No such file or directory

Tried de-installing and installing from scratch again, but same issue.

-=david=-
